summary: Bootstrap & PWA Recovery Fix: stale service-worker/cache responses can no longer strand the application at its initial 7% boot screen.
features: Inline recoverable module bootstrap prevents a frozen 7% screen when a stale service worker returns an invalid JavaScript response
One automatic local cache and service-worker cleanup followed by a cache-busted retry
Visible manual Retry control if the second application bootstrap attempt still fails
Service worker no longer returns index.html as a fallback for JavaScript module requests
Optional MediaPipe/model pre-cache failures no longer abort service-worker installation
Fresh Vercel no-store caching policy for application JavaScript modules
Checksum-pinned official self-hosted MediaPipe HandLandmarker model retained
